OverHistory.NewCommentry: Axar Patel to Aiden Markram Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Axar Patel bowling to Aiden Markram, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Aiden Markram plays an aggressive cut shot WICKET Aiden Markram b Axar Patel (Lucknow Super Giants 48 Runs for 2 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
The arm-ball does the trick! Axar gets his first with a peach!, Axar Patel bowls a good length ball, pitching outside off stump, the ball coming with the arm coming into the right-hander, beats Markram on the cut to crash the off-stumps! This was brilliantly bowled from Axar, and he gets the reward! Markram has to depart playing a wrong line! 

WICKET Aiden Markram b Axar Patel (Lucknow Super Giants 48 Runs for 2 wickets)

OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Natarajan gets one more!, T Natarajan bowling to Abdul Samad, full length ball, pitching on off stump, Abdul Samad does not time the loft well enough as he holes out to MIller at long-off! The Pressure was building and building, and Samad perishes on an attempt to get more! 

WICKET Abdul Samad c David Miller b T Natarajan (Lucknow Super Giants 138 Runs for 7 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: T Natarajan to Mohammad Shami Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: T Natarajan bowling to Mohammad Shami, full toss ball, on off stump, Mohammad Shami slices over point WICKET Mohammad Shami c Kuldeep Yadav b T Natarajan (Lucknow Super Giants 140 Runs for 8 wickets) towards Forward Point
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
NATTU BRINGS UP HIS 3!, T Natarajan bowling to Mohammad Shami, full toss ball, on off stump, Shami looks to go big on the off side, trying to carve it through the air, but only manages a thick slice off the toe of the bat. The ball balloons up, and Kuldeep positions himself perfectly at the backward point, making it a straightforward catch with his fingers pointing skywards!

WICKET Mohammad Shami c Kuldeep Yadav b T Natarajan (Lucknow Super Giants 140 Runs for 8 wickets)towards Forward Point

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Lungisani Ngidi to Anrich Nortje Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Lungisani Ngidi bowling to Anrich Nortje, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Anrich Nortje plays an aggressive lofted on drive on the front foot WICKET Anrich Nortje c Tristan Stubbs b Lungisani Ngidi (Lucknow Super Giants 141 Runs for 9 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
In the air and taken!,Lungisani Ngidi bowling to Anrich Nortje, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Anrich Nortje goes for a big loft, does not get that on the middle. Stubbs slides at long off and completes the catch! DC bowlers are just nailing it! 

WICKET Anrich Nortje c Tristan Stubbs b Lungisani Ngidi (Lucknow Super Giants 141 Runs for 9 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Lungisani Ngidi to Mohsin Khan Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Lungisani Ngidi bowling to Mohsin Khan, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Mohsin Khan plays a defensive forward push WICKET Mohsin Khan c Mukesh Kumar b Lungisani Ngidi (Lucknow Super Giants 141 Runs for 10 wickets) towards Gully
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
DC bowl LSG out for 141!, Lungisani Ngidi bowling to Mohsin Khan, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Mohsin Khan tries to work this on the off-side, he does not bother to keep that down as Mukesh Kumar at gully completes a low catch! Two wickets in the previous over and two wickets now in this over, great piece of bowling from DC today! Will DC be the first away side to win a game this tournament? Let's wait for Chase! 

WICKET Mohsin Khan c Mukesh Kumar b Lungisani Ngidi (Lucknow Super Giants 141 Runs for 10 wickets)
